Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...

Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

recipes.title: Fall Chicken and Rice Soup Recipe
recipes.description: This home-cooked, hearty chicken soup is ideal for the fall and winter months of the year. Enjoy this mom-like, flavor-rich soup recipe, using Trifecta's A La Carte items.
ingredients: 8 cups water or stock, chicken and vegetable/mushroom base, split
To taste, Salt and Black Pepper
instructions: Prepare the chicken by dicing the chicken, or using the Trifecta pulled chicken, if preferred. Keep in a bowl until needed. Separately, prepare all vegetables as indicated. For the carrots, peel 2-3 depending on the size, cut the ends and discard, slice in half, and cut across evenly about 1” size half-moons. After washing, cut the celery across in an equivalent size to the carrots, discarding the tops and bottoms. Dice the onions on a medium size and mix with celery and carrots. This is call...

In a pan deep enough to hold all ingredients plus stock, heat up the grapeseed oil over medium-high heat, until the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking. Immediately add the mirepoix (onion, celery, carrot mix) and increase heat to high. Stir often avoiding the onions from burning, and adjust heat as needed, reducing if the vegetables begin to charr too much.

Cook mirepoix for 3-5 minutes, again - adjusting the heat as needed - or until the vegetables begin to become translucent. Add the diced chicken, along with the tomato paste. Mix to coat all ingredients in the pot with it. The tomato paste should cook and become fragrant for a few minutes. Before the paste begins to burn, add the stocks to the pan to deglaze and mix scraping any brown bits (this is flavor so make sure you do this with a wooden spoon ideally).

Bring the mix to a boil. Once boiling, add broccoli and rice. Simmer for another 3 minutes or until all vegetables are heated through. Serve immediately dividing all soup guts amongst 4 bowls, and then topping off with any extra stock.

If not eating immediately, cool the soup immediately by placing a large Ziploc bag filled with ice inside the pot, stirring occasionally. Once cooled down to 40F or below, store in an air-tight container.

recipes.title: Fast Chicken Shawarma with Sweet Potato Recipe
recipes.description: The beauty behind chicken Shawarma is in the mix of spices. Follow the quick Shawarma wet rub recipe that will pack a punch of flavor and create an almost-authentic dish!
ingredients: Garnish, optional: Greek-lemon yogurt and chopped fresh parsley
½ teaspoon of the following: ground garlic, ground cumin, ground caraway, ground cardamom, ground ginger, paprika, ground cinnamon, and black pepper
instructions: Mix the Shawarma wet rub ingredients in a bowl. The consistency should be a paste
Dice the chicken into bite-size squares, as even as possible. Add diced chicken into the bowl with the spice paste. Mix to coat evenly.

Heat up a non-stick pan over medium heat, and spray to coat with spray oil. Add the chicken and heat for 2-3 minutes. Taste to make sure chicken is heated through. Turn off heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm-up both sweet potato mash and broccoli in separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave. Add 30 seconds if broccoli and sweet potato are not heated through. Keep warm until needed.
Plate ½ cup of sweet potato, along with ½ cup of broccoli and 4 ounces of the chicken Shawarma. Garnish with greek-lemon yogurt and parsley if desired.

recipes.title: High Protein Pesto Pasta Recipe
recipes.description: This vegan spinach & artichoke spirulina pesto pasta recipe makes a zesty and flavorful pasta dish incorporating function and flavor by utilizing the superfood spirulina in a freshly prepared pesto.
ingredients: High Protein pasta made from chickpea, peas, or lentils
½ Cup Sun-dried tomatoes, packed in oil, drained
For the Pesto: (makes about 1 ½ cups)
1 Cup Packed parsley leaves, stems on!
⅓ Cup Olive oil or avocado oil (less bitter)
instructions: Prepare Pasta According to Packaged Instructions, remember to reserve about ¼ cup of the pasta water. Return the empty pot to the stove and set cooked pasta aside.
For the Pesto: In the base of a food processor add all of the ingredients. Pulse until blended thoroughly, add additional lemon juice or apple cider vinegar if needed for consistency.

Preheat the empty pasta pot over medium heat. Add the artichokes and Sundried tomatoes. Cook for 2 minutes. Add the Spinach and cook slightly, about 1-2 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the cooked pasta, pesto, and pasta water, stir, and plate.
Garnish with vegan parmesan or toasted sunflower seeds if desired.

recipes.title: Homemade Vegetarian Chili Recipe
recipes.description: A delicious high protein, one-pot vegetarian chili recipe made with beyond meat burgers and simple ingredients simmered in hearty blend of seasonings.
ingredients: 1/2 cup roasted red pepper, drained from jar
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
4 tablespoons orange juice or apple cider vinegar
instructions: In a saucepot on medium-high heat, add avocado oil or olive oil, minced garlic, diced onion, celery, and carrot. Stirring occasionally cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until the onions begin to brown.

Once the meat and vegetables have browned, add in the spices and roasted red peppers and cook for 1 minute until aromatic and stir to combine. Stir in the crumbled Trifecta meat patties and cook for 3 minutes or add 16 ounces of beyond meat and cook for 5 minutes.

Continue to cook on medium-high heat and add vegetable stock to release any of the brown bits stuck to the pan, then stir in the diced tomatoes and beans; bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer cook for 10 minutes. Season with orange juice or apple cider vinegar, a pinch of salt or pepper is desired then dig in!

recipes.title: Low-Carb Portobello Mushroom Bruschetta
recipes.description: Whether you're looking to get more vegetables into your diet or in the search for a tasty healthy appetizer, this recipe is the perfect thing for you!
instructions: First, heat up a skillet or a grill. Then spray the Mushrooms with non stick spray. Grill for 2-3 minutes on each side. Remove from heat but keep the stove/ grill on.
In a bowl, mix the tomatoes, garlic, balsamic vinegar, and basil together. Add the mix to the inside of the mushrooms.
Top the mushrooms with cheese and place back on the skillet/grill.
Cover and heat for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese has melted. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Paleo Gluten-Free Granola Recipe
recipes.description: This succulent, nutty, and texture-rich granola is an incredible paleo-approved and gluten-free granola recipe you can make in bulk and use as needed.
instructions: Preheat oven to 300F. Measure cashews, macadamia nuts and almonds into a food processor. Pulse until the nuts are rough chopped, 3-5 times. Transfer to a bowl. In the same bowl, add pepitas chia seeds, crancherry, coconut flakes, cinnamon, allspice, and cayenne pepper.
In a separate bowl, combine melted or liquid coconut oil, maple syrup, vanilla extract, and almond flour. Mix to combine.
Combine nut/seed mix with coconut oil/almond flour mix. Mix to fully coat all ingredients together.

Transfer paleo granola to a parchment-lined baking sheet and spread evenly. Bake for 20 minutes in a preheated oven. Remove from the oven after time is up, let cool completely and then break into small pieces. Transfer to an airtight container.

recipes.title: Simple Vegetable Frittata Recipe
recipes.description: Make this savory vegetable egg white frittata in advance to add some lean protein and nutrition to your weekly meal prep.
instructions: Pre-heat oven to 350 degrees. Warm 9-inch casserole dish in the oven before cooking.
Warm oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the spinach and turn off the heat.
In a blender, add egg whites and cottage cheese. Pulse on high until the mixture is fully combined.
Remove the casserole dish from the oven. Add veggies to the casserole dish and spread evenly.
Pour egg mixture over the veggies.
Cook for 45 min to 1 hour until the center is cooked through. Let cool for 15 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Smoked Paprika Steak Stir Fry Recipe
recipes.description: The perfect match for any meal prep diet. This paleo and keto steak stir-fry recipe is smokey, savory and a little tangy, and takes less than 10 minutes to make!
instructions: Wash and chop your veggies and slice the steak into bite-sized pieces. Mince the fresh cilantro leaves and stems.
Using spray oil, coat a non-stick skillet and saute asparagus over medium-high heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add tomatoes and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add steak and cook for an additional minute, then turn off the heat.
Add sauce mixture to the pan and stir to coat everything evenly.
Plate it and dig in!

recipes.title: Trifecta Five Minute Burger Recipe
recipes.description: Looking for a simple quick meal using Trifecta's beef patties? Here's a legitimately simple and quick recipe. Enjoy and indulge in a healthy burger recipe!
ingredients: 4 hamburger buns, whole wheat or whole grain, toasted
2 tablespoons chipotle mayo or favorite condiment
½ cup arugula or any other bitter leafy green
½ cup Trifecta portobello mushroom, warmed
1 cup favorite Trifecta veggies, as a side
instructions: Begin by toasting buns in a toaster or toaster oven until golden brown.

Microwave Trifecta patties for 2 minutes to reheat, by making a small hole in a corner to allow steam to escape. Carefully remove plastic film and keep warm until needed. Spread the chipotle mayo on both burger buns. On the bottom bun, add a small ⅛ packed cup of arugula.

Slice tomatoes. Slice the avocados lengthwise and separate them into quarters. Fan avocado and place on top of the leafy greens. Carefully transfer the patties from the microwave to the bottom burger bun. Place 3 thin tomato slices or 2 thick slices on top of each patty. Top with ⅛ cup warm mushrooms and place the top bun on the burger.
Optional side: Reheat 1 cup of your favorite Trifecta vegetable and enjoy your 5-minute dinner!

recipes.title: Turkey Stuffed Bell Peppers
recipes.description: The combination of both sweet and spicy coming from the bell peppers, mixed with the tender ground turkey, and the gooey goodness of melted cheese, will certainly make this recipe a favorite!
ingredients: 2 Whole Bell Peppers (We used Red & Green)
1/2 Cup of Low Fat Shredded Cheddar Cheese
instructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees. Then, cut the bell peppers in half, remove seeds, and clean.

In a large bowl, crumble the Trifecta turkey burgers and mix with the onions, bread crumbs, tomato, garlic, and other seasoning. Add half of the cheese to the bowl (save other half for the top). Add a dash of salt and pepper. Mix well together.
Spray a baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray. Then add the bell pepper halves. Fill each bell pepper with the stuffing. Heat for 15-20 minutes.
Remove from heat and add the rest of the cheese to the top of the peppers. Place back in the oven for 3-5 minutes or until cheese is melted.

recipes.title: Ultimate Vegan Pot Roast Recipe
recipes.description: Fall in love with this easy and wholesome plant-based vegan pot roast recipe with Beyond Sausage® Brat and explosive flavor.
ingredients: 1 package Beyond Beef® Brat Sausage* (4 links)
2 ¼ cup vegetable stock or broth, low-sodium
instructions: Heat pot over medium-high heat and add oil. Sear the fresh portabello mushrooms for 5 minutes until they begin to dark in color and shrink in size. Add 1/4 cup water to help steam them and prevent burning.
Remove the mushrooms from the pan. still cooking over medium-high heat add the sliced Beyond Sausage® and saute for 3-4 minutes.
Add your carrots, onions, and celeriac and cook for 5 minutes, until slightly browned.
Carefully deglaze the pot by adding the pomegranate juice. Use this to scrape off the 'fond' from the bottom and sides of the pot.
Now add the spices, mustard, stock, and mushrooms and simmer for 25-30 minutes until the mushrooms are tender and the liquid has reduced more than a quarter of its original volume.
Finish by thickening the braising liquid with cornstarch or arrowroot starch and dig in!

recipes.title: Vegan Southwest Baked Sweet Potato Recipe
recipes.description: Our vegan Southwest baked sweet potato recipe only requires a few fresh ingredients, spices, and a baked sweet potato for a satisfyingly simple meal.
ingredients: Trifecta A la Carte Beyond Meat® burgers,
crumbled or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Meat burgers®
¼ cup vegetable stock or water
1 Roma tomato, diced or ½ cup pico de gallo
instructions: To bake your potato in less time, cut your sweet potatoes in half lengthwise and rub with oil (utilize coconut oil for extra flavor), place sweet potatoes cut side down on a baking sheet lined with foil and roast for 25-30 minutes until tender. Move onto the next steps while your sweet potatoes are baking in the oven.
In a food processor or blender, add the cilantro, vegan yogurt, lime juice, and chili powder. Blend until smooth, then place crema into a separate container and store in the fridge until needed.

To prepare your filling, heat a large saute pan over medium-high heat and add 1 teaspoon oil, then add the garlic and onion. Saute the garlic and onion for 4 minutes until they are fragrant and begin to brown.
Crumble the Beyond Meat or Trifecta A la Carte Beyond Meat burger patties into the saute pan and cook for 5 minutes, mixing with the onion and garlic

Add the corn, bell pepper, and spices, continuing to cook over medium-high heat for 2 more minutes then finish by adding lime juice and stock or water. Cook for an additional minute then remove from heat.
Build your sweet potato by layering the filling into the baked potato, then topping with sliced green onion, avocado, and the cilantro crema.

recipes.title: Simple Quinoa Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: Crush your vegan macros with this easy grain salad recipe. It's crunchy, vibrant, a little sweet, and somewhat cheesy - and more than enough to keep you feeling satisfied.
instructions: Warm quinoa in a microwave for about 1 minute, until lightly warmed (close to room temperature). Add to a large mixing bowl, stirring to break it up.
Drain broccoli and add to the bowl. Chop any large pieces into smaller, bite-sized pieces.
Coarsely chop almonds and add to the bowl.
Chop scallions and parsley and add to quinoa.
Chop figs into small pieces and add to the mixture.
Season with olive oil and lemon juice.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Finish with nutritional yeast and enjoy!

recipes.title: Simple Salmon Salad Recipe
recipes.description: Perfect your keto or paleo meal prep in minutes with this easy and healthy salmon salad recipe. Get 30 grams of protein and only 7 grams of net carbs, with a ton of flavor and nutrition.
instructions: Mince shallot and zest lemon.
In a small bowl mix lemon zest, lemon juice, shallot, and dijon mustard. Whisk in olive oil until smooth. Season with salt and pepper to taste and set aside.
Wash and chop lettuce and tomatoes. Set aside.
Cook bacon until crispy and let cool. Once cooled, chop into bite-sized pieces.
Peel and cube avocado.
Divide ingredients into four portions and toss together lettuce, tomato, bacon, and avocado.
Pan sear or warm salmon in the oven for a few minutes.
Toss salad greens in dressing and top with warmed salmon.
Enjoy!

recipes.title: Vegan Savory Grilled Tofu, Broccoli, and Rice Bowl
recipes.description: Organic tofu seasoned with nutty and savoury nutritional yeast, grilled to perfection and served on top a bed of brown rice, black beans, and fresh veggies, tossed in a simple vinaigrette. Packed with plant-based protein and good nutrition.
ingredients: 1 can black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Evenly slice your tofu into strips (about 2 ounces each), pat dry and season with half of the nutritional yeast and pepper.
Add cooking spray on a non-stick grill pan and warm to medium-high heat. Once ready, add your tofu and grill for 3 minutes on each side until it starts to crisp up and leave grill marks.
Add your rice, drained beans, and broccoli to a large mixing bowl. Season with oil, remaining nutritional yeast, black pepper, and salt.
Portion out your rice mixture onto four plates or meal prep containers and top each with 3 pieces of grilled tofu.
Garnish with herbs and a sprinkle of salt.
Enjoy!

recipes.title: Vegan Tofu Tabbouleh Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: Dig into this phytonutrient dense vegan tofu tabbouleh bowl recipe is composed of fried tofu, quinoa, and fresh vegetables tossed with a refreshing almond and walnut tabbouleh
ingredients: 3-4 small beets, roasted at home, or store-bought sliced
or 1 package of firm tofu cut into cubes
instructions: Prepare your fried tofu, tabbouleh, and quinoa according to recipe directions. Combine the quinoa and 2 cups tabbouleh together to marinade. You should have extra tabbouleh for finishing your bowl.

Wash your vegetables and greens. Remove the stems from the kale and finely chop. Using a vegetable peeler, peel the carrot into fine strips. Toss the kale, carrots, and chickpeas together and set aside.
Remove the peel from your orange and slice into slices. Do this over a bowl to save any orange juice and mix it into the tabbouleh.
To build your bowl: measure 1/3 cup tabbouleh and quinoa mixture, 4 ounces tofu, 1/2 cup roasted beets, 3-4 sliced orange, 1 cup kale, carrot, and chickpea salad. Top with extra tabbouleh if desired.

recipes.title: Honey Sriracha Turkey Meatballs
recipes.description: Sick of the same old meal prep week after week? This spicy and sweet combination is sure to reignite your meal prep flame. Tender and juicy turkey meatballs paired with light and fluffy brown rice, this is the meal you will look forward to throughout the week.
ingredients: 1/4 Cup of Pineapple (not for the inside of the meatballs)
instructions: In a large bowl, mix all of the ingredients for the turkey meatballs.
Roll meatballs into 1-inch balls. Place off to the side when rolled.

Heat up a skillet over medium. Grill the turkey meatballs on all sides, until each side is slightly browned. (Cover the skillet for 1-2 minutes to cook the inside of the meatballs before removing from heat).
In a small bowl, mix all of the ingredients for the sauce.
Dip the cooked meatballs into the sauce until thoroughly glazed in sauce.
Pair the meatballs with brown rice. Add in the pineapple. Top with sesame seeds and green onions. Add a lime for additional flavor.

recipes.title: Keto Zhoug Sauce Recipe
recipes.description: A light yet highly flavorful keto Zhoug sauce recipe, similar to chimichurri but unique to its own essence.
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Prepare all ingredients as indicated. Combine all of them in a blender with the exception of the oil.

Before turning the blender on, begin pouring the oil slowly into the blender (remove the top or the middle plastic guard of the lid if one exists). Then turn on the blender and increase the speed to medium as you slowly continue to add the rest of the oil until all ingredients are pureed into an emulsified sauce.
Once all product is blended, taste for seasoning and adjust if needed. Also, feel free to add extra oil to yield a larger amount of sauce.
Transfer the sauce to a container and store in the fridge.

recipes.title: Low-Carb Pasta with Cashew Chicken Alfredo
recipes.description: With only 371 calories per PLATE, you won't believe how amazing this pasta tastes. Full of creamy, nutty, goodness, you will be addicted at first bite. All you need is a few ingredients, a blender, a skillet, 5 minutes, and you are ready to make this delight!
ingredients: 1 Pack of Tofu Shirataki Fettuccini Noodles
instructions: Using a blender, blend the cashews, almond milk, and nutritional yeast. Blend until smooth / moderately thick consistency is reached.
Then, rinse the Shirataki noodles a few times and dry.
On a cutting board, cut up the Trifecta Chicken into slices.
Heat a skillet up to medium temperatures. Spray with non-stick spray. Add the chicken and grill until slightly brown. Remove the chicken from heat.
Once all of the chicken has been removed, spray the skillet again with non-stick spray. Add the Shirataki noodles and cook for about a minute (make sure to move the noodles around).
Pour the cashew sauce into the pan. Mix the pasta around with the sauce for a few minutes. Add more almond milk if the sauce starts to thicken.
Add the chicken back into the pan. Mix. Then add the fresh basil and let the basil cook into the pasta.
Remove pasta from heat and serve. Top with red pepper flakes for a kick.

recipes.title: Tempeh Garlic Ginger Soy Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: This quick and easy tempeh recipe adds a different texture through this high-protein meat alternative and adds a punch of flavor through the sauce itself.
ingredients: 16 ounces Tempeh, diced into bite sizes
1 cup Trifecta mixed veg or broccoli
1 avocado, sliced lengthwise, divided into quarters
instructions: For sauce: In a small saucepan, heat 2 teaspoons of avocado oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and ginger, and stir often for about 1 minute or until a dark golden color begins to form. Add red pepper flakes, Chinese five-spice, and stir for another 30 seconds, until spices are bright. Immediately add the tamari, stir and bring to an aggressive simmer for 3-5 minutes. As the sauce simmers, mix cornstarch and water in a small bowl to make a slurry. Add slurry into the sauce and simmer...

Heat remaining 1 teaspoon of avocado oil in a large non-stick saute pan over medium-high heat. Add 1 teaspoon of garlic, stir to avoid garlic from burning, and immediately add diced seitan. Mix often. The goal with this step is to sear and develop a golden brown color for the seitan. Once the seitan has caramelized, add the sauce to the pan and stir. Add the Trifecta bell peppers. Coat seitan and veggies evenly and cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm up the rice in the microwave for about 2-2:30 minutes, along with the Trifecta broccoli.
Portioning in 4 bowls, plate in each ½ cup of Trifecta rice, ¼ cup of broccoli, and 4.5 ounces of tempeh mix. Garnish with ¼ avocado per bowl, sesame seeds and fresh cilantro.

recipes.title: Vegan BBQ Tofu Stir Fry Recipe
recipes.description: By combining tofu with some whole grains, a beautiful veggie mix, and a delightful easy sauce, this stir fry dish sets out to be a winner for any day of the week.
ingredients: 1 tablespoon Tamari (gluten-free soy sauce), low sodium preferred
3 each Garlic, fresh, grated or 2 teaspoon garlic powder
1 teaspoon Ginger, fresh, grated, or 3 teaspoons ginger powder
instructions: Prepare the BBQ sauce by combining all ingredients in a bowl. Whisk to incorporate. Keep on the side.

Drain tofu and press by placing paper towels in the top and bottom of the tofu and placing a hefty book carefully on top of the tofu. Use a small sheet tray if needed to capture the water drainage. Press for at least 5 minutes, discard paper towels, and then dice block evenly. Transfer to a bowl. Season tofu with cornstarch, 2 tablespoons of the BBQ sauce, and a pinch of salt. Mix with hands to coat tofu evenly. Set aside.

Heat up avocado oil on a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil is slightly smoking (about 30-45 seconds of constant heat), add the tofu. You want to hear a sear go on as we are looking at caramelizing the tofu and browning it on most sides. Do this for about 2-3 minutes, stirring as necessary. Add the vegetables, along with the quinoa and brown rice. Saute for another 2-3 minutes until heated through. Lastly, add the sauce into the pan and mix to coat all ingredients evenly. The s...

Conversely, if you are tracking your macros closely, heat up the quinoa separately in a bowl in the microwave, covered with a damp paper towel for 2 minutes. Do the same with the Trifecta vegetables. Still reheat the tofu in the pan by searing it over medium-high heat with avocado oil and the sauce.
Portion ⅔ cup of quinoa, ½ cup of Trifecta veggies, and 4 ounce of the saucy tofu on a bowl. Garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro, and some sesame seeds.
Enjoy!

recipes.title: Vegan High Protein Veggie Pasta Recipe
recipes.description: This vegan pasta recipe is simple, refreshing and hearty. Made with lentil pasta with fresh cooked organic veggies and vibrant herbs in a salty and savory dressing.
instructions: Cook pasta al dente. Let cool and set aside.
Dice scallions and coarsely chop parsley for garnish. Set aside.
Combine pasta and veggies in a large bowl.
Add oil, lemon zest, and seasoning.
Finish with parsley and scallion.
Enjoy!

recipes.title: Vegan Meatballs & Spaghetti Squash Pasta Recipe
recipes.description: Step-up your vegan meal prep game with this plant-based spaghetti and meatball recipe. Sure to impress, you'll want to share this with friends.
ingredients: 1 (25 oz) Jar Tomato Basil Pasta Sauce, store-bought or homemade
Pinch of Black Pepper and Sea Salt
instructions: Preheat an oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit. Place spaghetti squash cut-side down on a foil-lined sheet tray and roast for 25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let sit on the baking tray for 5 minutes. Using a fork, scrape out the inside spaghetti and set aside.
Place the beyond beef into a medium bowl, then combine all other meatball ingredients into a food processor, pulse till coarsely chopped. Mix with the beyond beef and form 1-inch meatballs.
Pre-heat a medium-sized non-stick skillet over medium heat, add oil.
Sear meatballs in the pan for 5 minutes, turning occasionally. Add Pasta Sauce and simmer for 20 minutes.
To plate: combine with spaghetti squash and top with vegan parmesan, red pepper flakes, and fresh herbs.

recipes.title: Vegan Tofu Tikka Masala Recipe
recipes.description: This creamy and cozy vegan tikka masala recipe will have you inspired to spice up all your go-to recipes.
ingredients: 16 ounces of store-bought baked tofu, or 1
Trifecta A la Carte white rice
instructions: Preheat the oven to 450 degrees fahrenheit. Trim the cauliflower into small florets and, in a bowl, mix together the cauliflower, coconut oil, nutritional yeast, garam masala, and lime juice. Spread out the cauliflower onto a baking tray lined with a reusable liner or parchment paper. Bake for 20 minutes, until slightly golden, then remove from the oven. Cut the baked tofu into medium-sized pieces or prepare one recipe fried tofu and set aside.
Prepare the tikka masala sauce
Add your roasted vegetables and tofu to the simmering tikka masala sauce and cook for 5 minutes, then remove from the heat.
Serve 1-1.5 cups of masala with 1/2 cup of rice and top with chopped cilantro.
